input.query: exercise reduces heart disease risk 35 percent

content.content: Search results found multiple studies confirming this figure.

content.text: {"verdict":"Supported","confidence":"High","reasoning":"Multiple peer-reviewed studies confirm that 30 minutes of moderate exercise 5 days per week reduces cardiovascular disease risk by approximately 30-35%.","sources":[{"url":"https://www.who.int/news/item/exercise-heart-study","title":"WHO Exercise and Heart Health Study","snippet":"Regular moderate physical activity reduces cardiovascular mortality by 35%."}]}
